_comment: Canonical output shape for a check-skill rule. Eight detection scripts emit JSON envelopes — check_frontmatter, check_identity, check_prose, check_size, check_structure, check_secret, check_dangerous_patterns, check_cisco. Each script emits a single envelope or JSON array of envelopes (multi-rule scripts). Schema: {rule_id, overall_status, findings[]}; per-finding: {status, location, reasoning, recommended_changes}. recommended_changes is REQUIRED — non-empty with concrete repair guidance from skill-best-practices.md.

findings.reasoning: Frontmatter `name: My Skill` does not match the required slug shape `^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$`. The router uses `name` as the discoverable trigger; non-conforming slugs are unreachable via `/build:my-skill`-style invocations.
findings.recommended_changes: Set `name:` to a kebab-case slug (lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens; max 64 chars). Example: `my-skill`. Also rename the parent directory to match — `name` and the directory basename must agree (canonical Anthropic rule).
